rows.label: qev087503_MSG0001
rows.name:
About the beam-cannon project— is there any way
we can push the output up another 800 G's?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0002
rows.name: I know it's a lot...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0003
rows.name:
But if we can manage it, I think we
could punch through Growth armor![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0004
rows.name:
You want another 800
gigawatts' continuous output?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0005
rows.name: Yep![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0006
rows.name: Well, theoretically...sure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0007
rows.name:
Buuuut, what? There's some
kind of practical hurdle?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0008
rows.name: Exactly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0009
rows.name:
More output requires plasma maintained
at higher degrees of excitation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0010
rows.name:
That, in turn, requires a more
efficient magnetic trap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0011
rows.name: Ah, right.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0012
rows.name:
I'd love to see it happen, but Earth's
technology just isn't there yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev087503_SEL0011
rows.name: Console Lin on the end of her good idea.

rows.label: qev087503_JNK0020
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: qev087503_SEL0021
rows.name: Point out that you are no longer ON Earth.

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0013
rows.name: Thanks...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0014
rows.name:
Back up a minute. Why give up just because
Earth didn't have the technology?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0015
rows.name: Remember where we are now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0016
rows.name: That's a fair point.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0017
rows.name:
It's true that Earth may not have
possessed this technology...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0018
rows.name: but Mira could be a different story.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0019
rows.name: I don't follow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0020
rows.name:
Oh, I get it! She means xeno tech! We've
got all kinds of races here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0021
rows.name: One of them might have a solution![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0022
rows.name: Oh. Yeah, that...makes sense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0023
rows.name: What is that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0024
rows.name: One of the Growth's Dolls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0025
rows.name:
We confirmed that this model is outfitted
with a high-output beam cannon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0026
rows.name:
And it's almost a certainty that their
capacitors are better than ours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0027
rows.name: So if we can analyze them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0028
rows.name:
Right. We might be able to find a
solution to our magnetic-trap problem.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0029
rows.name:
Come on, guys. We've got a
giant laser to hunt down![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0030
rows.name:
Qmoevan capacitors are
hi-spec Growth items.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0031
rows.name:
You should be able to get them from
Qmoevas in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0032
rows.name:
Hmm, let's see. Could I ask you
to go collect three of those Qmoevan
capacitors now for analysis?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0033
rows.name:
We're talking about an extra 800 gigawatts here.
Just solving the magnetic-trap issue isn't going
to get you the giant beam weapon you want.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0034
rows.name:
I recommend you talk to Brena
about the other issues. She's
another engineer here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0035
rows.name:
She's stubborn as a rock, but
incredibly competent. I'm sure
her insights will be of use.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0036
rows.name:
Best of luck to you! What you're
trying takes guts, and I'm behind
you one hundred percent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0037
rows.name:
So Brena's on board with your new
weapon- development project?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0038
rows.name:
Ha! It would take somebody as
passionate as Lin to get that
stubborn girl to help. I'm impressed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0039
rows.name:
Now why don't you go show Commander
Vandham what that passion has wrought?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0040
rows.name: Did you need me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0041
rows.name:
I thought Brena said she had you
off gathering something for her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087503_MSG0042
rows.name:
I'll be here. Why don't you take care of
that first, then come back and see me?[ST:wait ]
